auth.passwordSignupPlaceholder: At least 6 chars, include letters & numbers
auth.signInTitle: Sign in to your RinLit account
auth.error.default: An error occurred. Please try again.
auth.error.invalid_credentials: Email or password is incorrect. Please try again.
auth.error.email_not_confirmed: Please confirm your email address before signing in. Check your inbox.
auth.error.email_exists: This email is already registered. Try signing in instead.
auth.error.user_already_exists: This email is already registered. Try signing in instead.
auth.error.weak_password: Password is too weak. Use at least 6 characters with a mix of letters, numbers and symbols.
auth.error.signup_disabled: New registrations are currently disabled. Please try again later.
auth.error.email_provider_disabled: Email/password sign in is currently disabled.
auth.error.over_email_send_rate_limit: Too many emails sent. Please wait a moment before trying again.
auth.error.over_request_rate_limit: Too many requests. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
auth.error.user_banned: This account has been temporarily suspended.
auth.error.validation_failed: Please check the information you entered and try again.
auth.error.same_password: Your new password must be different from your current password.
auth.error.otp_expired: The verification code has expired. Please request a new one.
auth.error.phone_not_confirmed: Please confirm your phone number before signing in.
auth.error.phone_exists: This phone number is already registered.
auth.error.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
auth.error.reauthentication_needed: For security, please sign in again to continue.
auth.error.password_length: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.signup.email_sent: Check your email for a confirmation link! You can sign in now.
auth.checkEmailDesc: But… one last step! A verification email has been sent to your inbox. Once verified, you're in!
auth.otpDesc: Click send code and we'll email a 6-digit code to this address.
auth.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.resetEmailSentDesc: A password reset link has been sent to your email.
auth.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.passwordUpdatedDesc: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in with your new password.
auth.signInRequiredDescription: Sign in to continue to RinLit.
auth.changeEmailDesc: Send a confirmation link to change your account email.
auth.confirmationSent: Confirmation email sent. Please confirm it from your new inbox.
auth.displayNameDesc: Used as your display name in RinLit.
auth.accountInfoDesc: Basic details from your account and profile record.
auth.signInRequiredDesc: After signing in, you will return to the previous page.
auth.notSignedIn: Sign in to access account settings.
auth.changePasswordDesc: Verify current password and set a new password.

gallery.filter.label: Filter
gallery.noResultsDesc: Try adjusting your search or filters.
gallery.emptyDesc: The first image will start here.
gallery.mySubmissionsDesc: Review submission status and request removal for published works.
gallery.noSubmissions: You have not submitted any works yet.
gallery.masterReviewDesc: Review pending submissions and removal requests.
gallery.manage.emptyDesc: Upload your first artwork here. Approved submissions will appear in Gallery.
gallery.submit.userOnly: Your account doesn't have permission to submit.
gallery.submit.submittedDesc: Your work is now in the review queue and will appear in Gallery after approval.
gallery.submit.publishedDesc: Your work has been published to Gallery and is available from the management page.
gallery.submit.tagsRequired: At least one tag is required.
gallery.submit.selectedImage: Image selected. Clear it to choose another.
gallery.submit.tagTooLong: Each tag can be up to 32 characters.
gallery.manage.noFilteredRequests: No pending requests in this filter.
gallery.favorites.emptyDesc: Click the heart icon on works in Gallery to save them here.
